title: Tunisian Flatbread Wraps with Savory Shaggy Meat
description: A fusion twist on traditional Thai street food, these Tunisian flatbread wraps are filled with savory shaggy meat and a tangy cheese.
instructions: Cut the Tunisian flatbread into 4 pieces.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cooked shaggy meat and savory spice, stir well.
Place a piece of flatbread on a flat surface.
Spoon the shaggy meat mixture onto the flatbread.
Fold the flatbread to form a wrap.
Optional: Grill the flatbread wraps for a crispy texture.
